surface.why_relevant: Plugins are now the fastest-moving product surface and must be treated as a first-class analysis bucket.
analysis_implications: Track plugin discover/install/auth/sync/UI as one lifecycle, not scattered changes.
Expect plugin changes to cross core, protocol, app-server, and TUI surfaces.
recent_signals: Missing versus empty product-list semantics were corrected.
One-time startup remote sync and git-first curated sync landed.
